name: oa-curator
description: Local-first desktop catalog for original art collectors.
author: Remgrandt Works
copyright: Copyright (c) 2026 Remgrandt Works. All rights reserved.

scripts.build: npm run docs:build && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:frontend: npm run typecheck && vite build && npm run bundle:check
scripts.check:frontend: npm run typecheck && npm run docs:build && npm run build:frontend
scripts.check:backend: cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.check:release: npm run check:frontend && npm run check:backend && git diff --check
scripts.release:macos: npm run tauri -- build --bundles app,dmg --target universal-apple-darwin
